ValidationRule.description: This validation rule will enable the users to add Portfolio Information on the purchased Scotia Insolvency accounts
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: If( TEXT(Client_Identifier__c) <> "Canaccede" && TEXT(Client_Identifier__c) <> "Fidem", IF(( (ISNEW() && ( NOT(ISBLANK(Portfolio_Name_Lookup__c)) || NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Portfolio_Group_Name__c))) || NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Investment_Group__c))) )) || ((NOT(ISNEW()) && (ISCHANGED(Portfolio_Name_Lookup__c ) || ISCHANGED(Portfolio_Group_Name__c) || ISCHANGED(Investment_Group__c))))) , IF(ISPICKVAL(Asset_Status__c, "Purchased") || ISPICKVAL(Asset_Status__c, "Duplicate Purchased") || ISPICKVAL(Asset_Status__c, "Bulk Purchased") || ISPICKVAL(Asset_Status__c, "Duplicate") || ISPICKVAL(Asset_Status__c, "Debt Purchase") , False, True) , False) , False)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Portfolio Information cannot be set for non-purchased accounts
